title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Dataset
subtitle: 48-team matches, squads, xG, events & team stats — updated daily

resources.description: All 48 qualified national teams with FIFA ranking, Elo rating, confederation, group, and manager name.
16 host stadiums in USA, Canada, and Mexico with capacity, coordinates, and altitude.
Tournament stage lookup (Group Stage, Round of 32, Quarter-finals, etc.).
16 elite match referees with nationality and historical cards-per-game average.
All 72 matches with dates, scores, xG (expected goals), venue/stage/referee references, and live status.
Denormalized match view with human-readable team names, stadium names, cities, starting goalkeepers, and referee names — no SQL joins needed.
1,248 players (26-man squads for all 48 teams) with positions, clubs, market values, caps, height, DOB, and international goals.
Goal, assist, yellow card, red card, and VAR review events with minute-by-minute timestamps.
Per-team per-match statistics: possession, shots, shots on target, corners, fouls, offsides, saves, and player of the match — sourced from FIFA, Sofascore, and The Guardian.
